dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: Transactional/commercial: buy a Cavapoo puppy in Singapore ('cavapoo singapore' 320/mo MEDIUM, 'cavapoo for sale singapore' 30/mo, 'cavapoo puppies' 170/mo)
dual_intent_strategy.secondary_intent: Commercial-investigation/informational: what does a Cavapoo cost and is the breed right for me ('cavapoo price singapore' 30/mo KD10 trending +150% yearly; supporting cluster: vs maltipoo 110, size 70, lifespan 50, temperament 40, hdb approved 20, grooming 20)
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: Transactional architecture leads (listings + price above the fold); the Definition Box and educational overview land within the first 30%. Both keywords appear in the first 150 words. Price content is co-primary: Curious Tails is the ONLY shop in the top 10 showing prices — price transparency is simultaneously the SEO gap and the conversion lever.

meta_title: Cavapoo Singapore | Puppies from $2,888 | Curious Tails
meta_description: Cavapoo puppies for sale in Singapore from $2,888, AVS licensed. Real prices, temperament, HDB rules and the $500+ starter kit included. WhatsApp us today.
h1: Cavapoo Puppies for Sale in Singapore

entity_definitions.definition: Curious Tails is an AVS-licensed pet shop at 2 Balestier Road, Singapore specialising in Cavapoo puppies and honest breed matching, with every puppy priced between $2,888 and $4,488 including a 30-plus item starter kit, free home delivery and setup, and a free AVS-certified training lesson.

A Cavapoo (also called a Cavoodle) is a cross between a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel and a Toy Poodle. It is a small companion dog with a wavy, low-shedding coat, an affectionate and intelligent temperament, moderate exercise needs of 30 to 60 minutes a day, and a lifespan of 12 to 15 years.

serp_analysis.dominant_content_format: Pet-shop product/listing pages with thin breed blurbs; one blog-style breed guide
serp_analysis.estimated_average_word_count: 600-1,200 for product pages; 1,500-2,500 for the one ranking guide
serp_analysis.search_intent_confirmation: SERP mixes shop product pages (rank 1,2,5,7,8,10) with community threads (rank 3) and one guide (rank 6), confirming dominant buy intent with a strong research sub-intent; both intents must be served on one page.

cavapoo price singapore: no owned featured snippet yet — winnable

top_competitor_weaknesses: Nobody shows prices except one sold listing ($3,880) — universal opacity
HDB claims contradict each other and the actual HDB list
Breed education thin on product pages (no size/lifespan/temperament depth)
No delivery/home-setup or onboarding content anywhere
Heavy 'DNA tested' import messaging, zero local aftercare proof
information_gaps_none_cover: Actual transparent pricing with a full what's-included value table
The honest HDB answer sourced to HDB/AVS rules (competitors assert 'HDB approved' with no source; one says not approved)
What happens AFTER purchase: delivery, playpen setup, first-week routine, free boarding until ready
Lifestyle-first matching (hours alone per day as the deciding factor) with a real named case study
How to verify any shop's AVS licence before paying
vagueness_gaps: "Regular grooming" (Woof Loof) → no brush frequency, no professional-groom interval, no humid-climate note
"30-60 minutes exercise" (all) → no Singapore reality: timing around heat, corridor/lift etiquette, park options
"Health screened parents" (several) → no vaccination schedule by week, no named conditions checked
"Apartment friendly" (Wag a Tail) → no distinction between HDB rules and condo living
unanswered_followup_questions: What will the first week at home actually look like?
How much per month does a Cavapoo cost AFTER purchase?
Toy vs standard Cavapoo — which size will mine end up?
Can they be left alone during work hours?
What if the puppy gets sick right after I take it home?
serp_analysis.sourcing_transparency_gaps: Competitors say 'Australia import' or 'ethical breeders' with no verifiable trail; nobody links the AVS public registry or teaches buyers to check it.
serp_analysis.regulatory_compliance_gaps: No top-10 page links HDB's actual keeping-pets rules or AVS limits-of-ownership; two pages make an unsourced 'HDB approved' claim that contradicts the official list.
cro_conversion_gaps: No price anchor anywhere — forces a WhatsApp message just to learn cost (high-friction)
Trust badges present but no licence NUMBER + registry link pairing
No micro-conversion for not-ready visitors (waitlists only)
No above-fold social-proof stat pairing (rating + review count + years)
decision_stage_gaps: No risk-reversal story: what happens if the puppy falls sick in week one
No 'total first-year budget' bridge for buyers doing final math
factual_conflicts_detected: "HDB Approved" (Wag a Tail, The Lovely Pets, Paw Palace) vs "Not HDB-Approved" (Woof Loof) → RESOLUTION: HDB's approved-breeds list names specific breeds (incl. Cavalier King Charles Spaniel and Toy Poodle individually); crossbreeds such as Cavapoo are NOT on the list. Source: hdb.gov.sg keeping-pets guidelines + avs.nparks.gov.sg limits-of-ownership. Page must state this honestly and route HDB dwellers to approved alternatives.

Adult size: 3-4kg (Woof Loof litter estimate) vs 5-10kg (Lovely Pets) vs 5-9kg (Pet Me Please) vs 9-14kg (ground-truth file) → RESOLUTION: depends on Poodle parent size; state honest range 5-10kg typical for Toy Poodle crosses and [VERIFY with Nelson/Kim: actual adult weights of past Curious Tails Cavapoos — first-party data no competitor can copy]
Lifespan: 12-15 (ground truth) vs 13-15 (Pet Me Please) vs 14-18 (Lovely Pets) → RESOLUTION: use 12-15 years, consistent with ground-truth sources; do not inflate.

featured_snippet.cavapoo singapore: format=none owned; target PARAGRAPH via Definition Box (What is a Cavapoo, 40-55 words)
featured_snippet.cavapoo price singapore: format=none owned; target TABLE via price/value comparison table (market range vs Curious Tails with inclusions) — ComparisonSplit component
featured_snippet.note: Mirror-the-SERP rule applied: no existing snippet for either keyword, so def-box paragraph (primary) and table (price) are both open targets.

serp_analysis.image_pack: Descriptive alt text pattern '[coat colour] cavapoo puppy singapore [context]'; gallery of real Curious Tails puppies beats competitors' stock imports
serp_analysis.knowledge_panel: WebPage.about → Thing 'Cavapoo' with alternateName 'Cavoodle' + sameAs Wikipedia; LocalBusiness sameAs AVS registry reinforces the seller entity

lsi_keyword_weighting.instruction: Weave each cluster into the sections that own it (transactional → Phases 1, 4, 5; informational → Phases 2, 3). Both clusters must independently reach ≥70% placement. Never stuff: one natural use per term is enough; sub-phrase fragments count via longer phrases that contain them.

schema_plan: WebPage — with about: { '@type': 'Thing', name: 'Cavapoo', alternateName: 'Cavoodle', sameAs: 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cavapoo' }, datePublished/dateModified, author { '@id': '#owner' }, isPartOf #website
LocalBusiness (reference via @id #business) — with sameAs: GBP, Instagram, Facebook, AVS public registry (per SCHEMA.md entity rules)
Person (#owner) — Nelson and Kim, AVS licensed pet shop owners, sameAs socials, worksFor #business (site-wide @id)
Product + AggregateOffer — name 'Cavapoo Puppy', priceLow '2888', priceHigh '4488', priceCurrency 'SGD', availability InStock, image hero
Review — Andrew Mak, 5, reviewBody verbatim quote, consent: yes
FAQPage — the 7 promoted FAQs, answers self-contained
Speakable — Definition Box + price answer capsule

info_gain_score.pct_p1_p2: 70% (19 of 27 sections P1/P2; 8 P1, 11 P2, 4 P3, 4 P4-TERMINAL)
gain_drivers: Only page in SERP with real prices + full inclusions table (P1, first-party)
Andrew Mak named case study — MAXIMUM gain, cannot exist elsewhere
Honest HDB answer resolving a live SERP factual conflict with government sources
First-week onboarding + free boarding + 5-day sick-return support — no competitor describes post-purchase reality
remaining_risks: [VERIFY] actual adult weights of past CT Cavapoos (strengthens size section from P3 to P1)
[VERIFY] monthly ongoing-cost ballparks need a citable source or CT first-party data
[VERIFY] which HDB-approved alternatives CT actually carries before naming them
Only 1 named consented testimonial — collect more per expertise-library PENDING items

content_length_estimate: 2,500-3,000 words (money-tier 2,500-3,500, mid-range; dual-intent educational depth ≥40% = ~1,100+ words on informational sections). Note: ground-truth file's older 1,500-2,000 target superseded by money-tier standard.

house_rule_reminders.note_on_competitors: Competitors lean on 'DNA tested' messaging — we CANNOT use that word. Counter with: AVS licensed, vet-checked, vaccinated, health-checked, verifiable at the government registry.
house_rule_reminders.health_framing: conditions mentioned once, through our screening lens, no fear-mongering
house_rule_reminders.guarantee_wording: 5-day sick-return = 'bring it back to the shop to nurse' — exact business-context framing, never 'we pay vet fees'
